problem id: ba61b815
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  01001001 -> 10000100
  10000001 -> 10001000
  00001000 -> 00000000
  00010010 -> 00000001
  01011000 -> 00000101
  11001011 -> 10001100
  00111110 -> 00000011
  00001110 -> 00000000

query: 11010000
predicted answer: 00001101
